Expected Behavior: Each indicator shows colored dot with status text

Expected Behavior: Green dot if API key valid and reachable, red otherwise

User Story: As a user, LM Studio is NOT checked at startup
Expected Behavior: LM Studio only checked when user selects it in radio button

User Story: As a user, UncloseAI is NOT checked at startup
Expected Behavior: UncloseAI only checked when user selects it in radio button

User Story: As a user, I can select Groq/UncloseAI/LM Studio via radio buttons
Expected Behavior: Selecting provider updates available models list

Expected Behavior: Dropdown shows models for selected provider, defaults to first

User Story: As a user, I can type a niche or select from predefined list

User Story: As a user, I can type a city or select from predefined list
Expected Behavior: Text input and selectbox both work, selectbox populates from REGION_COORDS

User Story: As a user, I can set search limit between 10-500
Expected Behavior: Slider with step 10, default 50

User Story: As a user, I click ШАГ 1 to start search
Expected Behavior: Button triggers run_search() with progress bar

User Story: As a user, I see progress during search
Expected Behavior: Progress bar updates with current phase (primary/secondary markers)

User Story: As a user, search uses PRIMARY_MARKERS first
Expected Behavior: Query template: niche + city + marker for each primary marker

User Story: As a user, if few results found, secondary markers are used
Expected Behavior: Only triggers if Phase 1 results < limit

User Story: As a user, duplicate companies are removed
Expected Behavior: Deduped by normalized company name AND URL

User Story: As a user, known aggregator domains are blocked from results
Expected Behavior: 72 domains + URL patterns + title patterns filtered

User Story: As a user, aggregator pages detected by content analysis
Expected Behavior: Post-fetch scoring: phones, ratings, catalog signals, company signals

User Story: As a user, I click ШАГ 2 to parse results
Expected Behavior: Button disabled until raw_items exist, triggers run_enrichment()

User Story: As a user, I see progress during enrichment
Expected Behavior: Progress bar shows percentage of sites processed

User Story: As a user, sites without LPR keywords in raw HTML are NOT skipped
Expected Behavior: quick_check_lpr() now logs warning but continues enrichment
Errors Found: Previously returned empty result if no LPR keywords in raw HTML
Fix Applied: Removed hard block at enricher.py:513-518, now only logs warning

User Story: As a user, real company sites are not falsely marked as aggregators
Expected Behavior: _is_aggregator_page() scoring: score >= 4 = aggregator (raised from 3)
Errors Found: Threshold too low caused false positives
Fix Applied: Raised threshold from 3 to 4 at enricher.py:282

User Story: As a user, if main page has <2 contacts, contact pages are tried
Expected Behavior: Tries /contacts, /about, /o-nas, /kontakty etc.

User Story: As a user, emails are found from mailto, JSON-LD, meta, regex
Expected Behavior: Multiple sources checked, blacklisted emails filtered

User Story: As a user, Russian phones are extracted from page
Expected Behavior: All phones saved (up to 5), deduplicated
Fix Applied: Changed to save all unique phones: ', '.join(unique_phones[:5])

User Story: As a user, VK links are found from href, regex, footer/header/nav
Expected Behavior: vk.com/m.vk.com/vk.cc detected and normalized

Expected Behavior: t.me/telegram.me/telegram.org detected, @username extracted

User Story: As a user, Instagram/YouTube/Odnoklassniki links are found
Expected Behavior: ig, yt, ok links detected from SOCIAL_DOMAINS

User Story: As a user, AI analyzes page text for contacts/LPR
Expected Behavior: Selected AI provider extracts emails, phones, VK, TG, people

User Story: As a user, if no VK link found, VK API searches for company
Expected Behavior: groups.search → users.search fallback

User Story: As a user, multiple sites are processed in parallel
Expected Behavior: Semaphore(7) limits concurrent Playwright sessions

Expected Behavior: Failed sites show error in log, don't stop batch

User Story: As a user, empty city is handled gracefully

User Story: As a user, ALL phones from a site are saved
Expected Behavior: All unique phones saved (up to 5), comma-separated

User Story: As a user, Cyrillic domain sites are not blocked
Expected Behavior: Only specific punycode aggregators blocked, not all xn-- domains
Errors Found: Blanket punycode check blocked ALL Cyrillic domains
Fix Applied: Removed blanket check, added specific punycode aggregators to blocklist

User Story: As a user, both files use same signals
Expected Behavior: Imported from search_providers.py, no duplication
Fix Applied: Added import from search_providers.py, removed local definitions

User Story: As a user, unused config constants are removed
Expected Behavior: FILTERS, MIN_PAUSE, MAX_PAUSE, MAX_REQUESTS_PER_HOUR removed

User Story: As a user, custom APIs appear in provider selection
Expected Behavior: Simplified to show saved APIs without broken checkboxes
Errors Found: Checkboxes disabled, no integration with AI pipeline
Fix Applied: Replaced with simple caption list showing saved API names

User Story: As a user, errors don't silently disappear
Expected Behavior: 25+ bare except: replaced with specific exception types
Errors Found: Bare except: clauses swallowed all exceptions silently
Fix Applied: Replaced all bare except: with Exception, JSONDecodeError, OSError, etc.

User Story: As a user, sync requests in async context don't block
Expected Behavior: search_website() now uses aiohttp instead of requests

User Story: As a user, progress bar doesn't exceed 100%
